changeSet.author: restaurantos-agent
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO loyalty_tier_config (tenant_id, tier, min_lifetime_spend_paisa, points_per_pkr_paisa) SELECT '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'::uuid, tier, min_spend, 100 FROM (VALUES ('BRONZE', 0), ('SILVER', 5000000), ('GOLD', 20000000) ) AS v(tier, min_spend) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM loyalty_tier_config WHERE tenant_id = '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'::uuid AND tier = v.tier );
